content.json:
# Cloud Cost Optimization Dashboard

Real-time compliance status and remediation tracking

content.query:
Violations
| where DetectedAt >= ago(7d)
| summarize
    TotalViolations = count(),
    PendingApproval = countif(ExpiresAt > now()),
    EstimatedMonthlyUSD = sum(EstimatedMonthlySavingsUSD)
    by ComplianceState
content.title: Compliance Summary (Last 7 Days)

content.query:
Violations
| where DetectedAt >= ago(30d)
| summarize count() by ComplianceState, bin(DetectedAt, 1d)
content.title: Violations Trend (30 Days)

content.query:
Approvals
| summarize
    Approved = countif(ApprovalStatus == 'Approved'),
    Rejected = countif(ApprovalStatus == 'Rejected'),
    Pending = countif(ApprovalStatus == 'Pending'),
    Expired = countif(ApprovalStatus == 'Expired')
content.title: Approval Status Distribution

content.query:
RemediationExecutions
| summarize
    Succeeded = countif(RemediationStatus == 'Succeeded'),
    Failed = countif(RemediationStatus == 'Failed'),
    InProgress = countif(RemediationStatus == 'InProgress'),
    TotalSavingsRealized = sum(EstimatedSavingsRealized)
content.title: Remediation Results

content.query:
Violations
| where ExpiresAt > now() and ComplianceState == 'NonCompliant'
| join kind=leftouter (Approvals) on ViolationId
| project
    ResourceName,
    ResourceGroup = ResourceGroupName,
    ComplianceState,
    EstimatedSavingUSD = EstimatedMonthlySavingsUSD,
    ApprovalStatus = iif(isnotempty(ApprovalStatus), ApprovalStatus, 'No Approval'),
    ExpiresIn = datetime_diff('hour', ExpiresAt, now())
| sort by EstimatedSavingUSD desc
content.title: Pending Violations (Active Approval Windows)

content.query:
AuditLog
| where CreatedAt >= ago(7d)
| summarize count() by Action
content.title: Audit Activity (7 Days)
